diff_hunk:
@@ -42,4 +42,6 @@ def validate_session(token):
-    return decode(token)
+    claims = decode(token)
+    if claims.expires_at < now():
+        raise ExpiredSessionError()
+    return claims
commit_message: Reject expired sessions before authorizing requests
author: Synthetic Demo
rationale: Prevent expired session tokens from authorizing a request after their expiry time.
